⚠ Compliance Deadline

State & local government WCAG 2.1 AA compliance required as of April 2026. Healthcare Section 504 deadline: May 11, 2026.

Am I compliant? →

Digital Compliance & Accessibility

Interpretation

Translation
How Government Agencies Meet Title VI Translation Requirements in 2026
The 5% threshold, vital documents, certified vs. machine translation — a practical breakdown of what the law actually requires and how to comply.
Jason R. Ehlinger · June 5, 2026 · 8 min read
Digital Accessibility

The April 2026 ADA Title II deadline has passed. These five remediation priorities make the biggest impact for most government sites.
Jason R. Ehlinger · May 28, 2026 · 6 min read
PDF Remediation
How to Make Your PDFs Section 508 Compliant: A Step-by-Step Guide
Most government PDFs fail Section 508 on the same six criteria. This guide walks through each failure, what it means, and how to fix it.
Jason R. Ehlinger · May 20, 2026 · 9 min read
Language & Culture
